verdict: The collision engine — the corpus's self-named "emergent narrative engine" — is NOT real as an engine. Its 8 collisions live only as hand-authored annotations in one reference doc (arc_register_events.md §VI), whose own header admits the combined payload is "not predictable from the constituent vectors"; no Key type, module_contract, sim module, or resolver detects trigger-coincidence or applies the payload. Independent vectors make the WHEN plausibly emergent, but the WHAT is scripted and nothing fires it. The autonomous world genuinely ticks (RS/TC/IP/Turmoil clocks, deterministic priority trees, neglect-driven insurgency), so a returning player finds a changed world — but the changes trend to a solved single-winner, and the richest stories (Thread/Calamity, the "world is dying" clock) have no render path. Personal transformation is the best-served Omega clause; non-dominance has multiple live violations under repair.
key_points: The 'emergent narrative engine' (throughlines §T-24) has no engine: 8 Convergence Markers live only in references/arcs/arc_register_events.md §VI as hand-authored trigger+payload annotations; grep of module_contracts.yaml, sim/, and the Key registry finds NO firer.

arc_register_events.md §VI header itself admits markers exist 'because the combined pressure is not predictable from the constituent vectors' — i.e. the payload is authored, not derived. throughlines_complete.md §T-24 misrepresents the same fact as 'not designed — they are structural.'
COLLISION C — the charter's own worked example of emergence — is anchored on an UNNAMED, unresolved ritual (ARC-T04 '[UNNAMED — ED-416]').

Articulation, the sole narrative-surfacing layer, is blind to §T-04 RS-decay/Calamity ('the world is dying' — the game's #1 clock throughline) and to victory-era transitions (ED-1006). Political emergence renders; Thread emergence does not.

Autonomous-world thought experiment: the world DOES change over 4 seasons (clocks + priority trees + insurgency-from-neglect are real) — a genuine strength — but change trends toward a degenerate ~87% single-winner (CLAUDE.md §7).
Literal no-GM violation: faction_layer_v30.md L490 'GM controls NPC faction votes' and L362 'GM adjudicates', inside an explicitly no-GM engine.

Cross-scale consequence propagates one hop up (Domain Echo, strong) but does not COMPOUND — the missing collision engine + unproven cross-tick convergence (propagation_spec §4.3) mean multi-echo qualitatively-new pressure is never computed.

Personal transformation is the best-served clause (Scars, arc state machines, Rendering Crisis, Belief revision) but is absent in the highest-frequency vector, combat (ED-911), and arc destinations are authored menus not emergent trajectories.

findings.claim: The corpus's self-named 'emergent narrative engine' (Convergence Markers) has no runtime home: the 8 collisions exist only as hand-authored trigger+payload annotations in one reference doc, and no Key type, module_contract, sim module, or resolver detects trigger-coincidence or applies the combined payload — so the flagship emergence mechanism is aspirational prose, not a mechanic.
findings.cite: references/arcs/arc_register_events.md §VI (L23-60); references/throughlines_complete.md §T-24 L200; module_contracts.yaml grep convergence/COLLISION (only L231/L442, unrelated); sim/ grep (numerical only)

findings.claim: Two canonical docs draw opposite conclusions from the same fact: arc_register_events.md §VI says a marker is authored 'because the combined pressure is not predictable from the constituent vectors,' while throughlines_complete.md §T-24 calls that same non-derivability proof the moments are 'not designed — they are structural' — a legibility/honesty gap that overstates how emergent the collision layer is.

COLLISION C — the charter's and T-24's own worked example of emergence (RS+8/IP+2/TC+2) — is triggered by ARC-T04 'Southernmost Ritual [UNNAMED — ED-416]', an unnamed and unresolved design item, so the canonical illustration of the emergent engine rests on a design hole.

The sole narrative-surfacing layer has zero Thread/Coherence/Calamity hooks, so §T-04 RS-decay ('the world is dying', the game's #1 autonomous clock throughline) has no render path — the renderer of emergence is blind to the setting's central story, compounding ED-1006 (era transitions unkeyed).
findings.tracked_ref: grounding 03 §3 / ED-1006 (era transitions); new scope: framed as articulation-blind-to-the-#1-clock-throughline

findings.claim: The autonomous-world Omega clause has a literal hole: faction_layer_v30.md delegates NPC faction voting and partial-ratification adjudication to a human GM inside an explicitly no-GM engine, so under zero player input the NPC-only-faction Parliamentary votes have no autonomous resolver.
findings.cite: designs/provincial/faction_layer_v30.md L490 ('GM controls NPC faction votes'), L362 ('GM adjudicates')
findings.tracked_ref: surfaced in faction_political dossier this session; no ED

findings.claim: The autonomous world runs but trends to a solved end: all 9 faction priority trees are deterministic if-then ladders and the seeded sim converges to a degenerate ~87%/0%/0% win-share, so 'autonomous' collapses toward 'predictable/solvable', in direct tension with the non-dominance clause the same world is meant to serve.
findings.cite: designs/npcs/npc_behavior_v30.md §8.1-§8.10; CLAUDE.md §7 (degenerate win-share, no regression oracle)

findings.claim: Cross-scale consequence propagates one hop up well (Domain Echo) but never COMPOUNDS: with no collision-marker firer (see collision-engine-has-no-engine) and cross-tick convergence explicitly unproven, the qualitatively-new multi-echo pressure that T-24 promises is never actually computed — the cross-scale clause is delivered at the edge but not at the composition that makes it narrative.

Personal-transformation is the best-served Omega clause (Conviction Scars, §T-23 arc state machines, Rendering Crisis perma -1 TS, §T-22 Belief revision) but is absent in the highest-frequency vector, combat (ED-911), and arc destinations are authored menus rather than emergent trajectories — so transformation is rich only where play is slow.
